# §Atoms

## Canon

The atomized methodology docs generated under docs/methodology/atoms/ from SETTLED requirements grouped by topic.

## Narrative

Atoms are the atomized methodology documents generated from SETTLED requirements, one coherent topic per atom, rendered under docs/methodology/atoms/. They are the reader-facing distillation of the substrate's SETTLED laws — the prose mirror of the graph, generated so it cannot drift.

## Why

WHY atomized docs (R-atomicity-ratchet-no-growth): a single monolithic methodology doc hides compound claims and grows without bound; atomizing by topic keeps each doc atomic (one claim, one WHY) and lets the atomicity ratchet ensure the surface never grows a compound claim that should itself be split.
